## Checklist
<!-- Put an `x` in all boxes that apply -->

- [ ] I have followed the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] JSON files are valid (run `python -m json.tool <file>.json`)
- [ ] README has been regenerated (run `python scripts/generate_readme.py`)
- [ ] All installation commands have been tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Hardware IDs are accurate and verified
- [ ] Download links are working
